fabricated_divergences.quote: German-language sources explicitly note the absence of Ukrainian confirmation of the Konstantinovka capture claim, while Vietnamese-language sources present the capture as confirmed with extensive quotes from President Putin and Russian military commanders and no Ukrainian government response.
fabricated_divergences.why_unsupported: The analysis of the Vietnamese article (index 9) explicitly states it also notes 'unconfirmed Ukrainian military accounts describing a severe crisis and the city becoming a gray zone.' So the Vietnamese source does NOT present the capture as confirmed with no Ukrainian input; it flags the claim as unconfirmed and includes Ukrainian military accounts, contradicting the claimed contrast.
